# MakerPrintTools

> MakerPrintTools is a global English-language collection of practical, browser-based 3D printing calculators for personal makers and small print operations.

## Primary pages
- [Homepage](https://makerprinttools.com/): Site overview and featured tools
- [Tools](https://makerprinttools.com/tools/): Complete calculator directory
- [About](https://makerprinttools.com/about/): Scope, methods, and limitations

## Calculators
- [3D Print Cost Calculator](https://makerprinttools.com/tools/cost/3d-print-cost-calculator/): Material, energy, labor, machine, and failure-adjusted cost
- [Electricity Cost Calculator](https://makerprinttools.com/tools/cost/electricity-cost-calculator/): Print energy and cost from measured average wattage
- [Filament Length to Weight Calculator](https://makerprinttools.com/tools/filament/length-weight-calculator/): Bidirectional filament length and mass conversion
- [Filament Spool Remaining Calculator](https://makerprinttools.com/tools/filament/spool-remaining-calculator/): Remaining net mass and length from spool weights
- [Filament Cost Calculator](https://makerprinttools.com/tools/filament/filament-cost-calculator/): Material-only cost with a waste allowance
- [Layer Count Calculator](https://makerprinttools.com/tools/print-settings/layer-count-calculator/): Layer count with distinct first layer
- [Volumetric Flow Calculator](https://makerprinttools.com/tools/print-settings/volumetric-flow-calculator/): Hotend flow demand and utilization
- [Model Scale Calculator](https://makerprinttools.com/tools/geometry/model-scale-calculator/): Linear scale, cubic volume, and estimated weight
- [Shrinkage Compensation Calculator](https://makerprinttools.com/tools/geometry/shrinkage-compensation-calculator/): CAD oversize from measured shrinkage
- [Resin Cost Calculator](https://makerprinttools.com/tools/resin/resin-cost-calculator/): Resin volume, waste, cost, mass, and bottle yield
- [3D Print Selling Price Calculator](https://makerprinttools.com/tools/business/3d-print-selling-price-calculator/): Price from production cost, fees, and target margin
- [Filament Needed Calculator](https://makerprinttools.com/tools/filament/filament-needed-calculator/): Batch material planning with process allowance and reserve
- [Multi-color Purge Waste Estimator](https://makerprinttools.com/tools/filament/multi-color-purge-waste-estimator/): Transition purge, tower material, reuse, and waste share
- [Failed Print Cost Calculator](https://makerprinttools.com/tools/cost/failed-print-cost-calculator/): Recovery-adjusted cost of failed attempts
- [Batch Print Cost Calculator](https://makerprinttools.com/tools/cost/batch-print-cost-calculator/): Setup, yield, unit cost, and production time for small runs
- [Machine Depreciation Calculator](https://makerprinttools.com/tools/cost/machine-depreciation-calculator/): Printer ownership cost per hour and per print
- [Profit Margin Calculator](https://makerprinttools.com/tools/business/profit-margin-calculator/): Net profit, margin, markup, and break-even price
- [Line Width Calculator](https://makerprinttools.com/tools/print-settings/line-width-calculator/): Nozzle ratio to line-width target and wall preview
- [Wall Thickness Calculator](https://makerprinttools.com/tools/print-settings/wall-thickness-calculator/): Target wall thickness translated into perimeter count
- [Resin Bottle Yield Calculator](https://makerprinttools.com/tools/resin/resin-bottle-yield-calculator/): Bottle yield and resin inventory for a production run
- [Hollow Model Resin Savings Calculator](https://makerprinttools.com/tools/resin/hollow-model-resin-savings-calculator/): Solid versus hollow resin use and avoided material cost

## Notes
- Calculator results are estimates and should be verified for safety-critical or commercial work.
- Calculations run locally in the browser and require no account.
- Canonical domain: https://makerprinttools.com
